steps.title: Find the removed area
steps.content: The starting area is $36$ square centimeters. Each small square removed has area $4$ square centimeters, so $x$ removed squares take away $4x$ square centimeters.

steps.title: Subtract from the start
steps.content: The remaining area is the starting area minus the removed area. $$f(x)=36-4x$$ The answer is A.
